name: parallel-codex-runner
description: Run, compare, and selectively accept isolated Codex candidates from the Codex app.

interface.shortDescription: Compare isolated Codex attempts before accepting one.
interface.longDescription: Run one task through multiple isolated Codex workspaces, follow each candidate, inspect complete patches, stop or retry attempts, and sync only the result you explicitly accept.
defaultPrompt: Run five isolated fixes for this task, then compare their patches with me.
Resume my latest Codex session in three candidates and show me the strongest patches.
Run several candidates for this bug and let me choose what reaches the workspace.
